title: ElytraSwimFix
description: Prevents elytra from being activated underwater
body:
# ElytraSwimFix Prevents elytra from being activated underwater [MC-260440](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-260440) ## Requirements/Installation 1. **Install the Fabric Loader**: - Download the Fabric Loader from the [Fabric website](https://fabricmc.net/use/). - Run the Fabric Loader installer and follow the on-screen instructions to install it for your Minecraft version.
2. **Install the Fabric API**: - Download the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Place the downloaded JAR file into your Minecraft `mods` folder (located in the `.minecraft` directory). ~~For Multiplayer use, the mod must also be applied to the server.~~
As of 26.1.0 this is now client-side mod. server side installation is no longer required **The mod will not trigger while holding a firework** ## Fix This Annoying Problem ![before](https://i.ibb.co/X35VDcP/before.gif) ![after](https://i.ibb.co/170vjWh/after.gif)
